member.name: M:WildNatureExplorer.API.Controllers.MapController.GetByCountry(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Get all species points for a country with full details

member.name: M:WildNatureExplorer.API.Controllers.MapController.GetDangerousByCountry(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get only dangerous species with their locations for danger mode

member.name: M:WildNatureExplorer.API.Controllers.MapController.SearchInCountry(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Search for a specific animal in a country

member.name: M:WildNatureExplorer.API.Controllers.MapController.GetCountryBounds(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get country bounds for map focusing

member.name: M:WildNatureExplorer.API.Controllers.MapController.CalculateDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculate distance between two coordinates using Haversine formula
